title: SAFE SLEEP UNITED - 211info
text: SAFE SLEEP UNITED SAFE SLEEP UNITED Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a low barrier, overnight shelter for women. Personal items are limited to what can be stored under half of the under-bed space. The location is scent free. No outside food or drinks are permitted. No drugs, alcohol, paraphernalia, or weapons are permitted. Dinner and continental breakfast provided. 1910 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Women experiencing homelessness. Pets are accepted as space allows. They must be well behaved and under their owner's supervision at all times. Guests must also be able to do the following: -Get around, eat, clean up, and use the restroom independently -Use the restroom quickly -Shower elsewhere at least once a week (no onsite shower) -Make their bed each morning and change the bedding once a week -Do one chore each day -Be willing and able to be up and out of the shelter by 7:15am each morning Hours: 7 days per week 5:45pm-7:15am Dinner: 6:30pm Continental breakfast: 5:30am-6:30am Email (503) 816-3409 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 816-3409 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for eligibility screening and to check availability. Walk-in is discouraged due to capacity. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - BUS PASS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFE SLEEP UNITED
